channel.description: Experimental research node exploring relational color systems, AI image generation, decentralized identity, and semantic web infrastructure.

item.description: Experimental research node exploring relational color systems, AI image generation, decentralized identity, and semantic web infrastructure.

item.title: Foundation Document – Version 9.1
item.description: Theoretical foundation exploring color as a generative principle in perception and AI-based image systems.
